rationale: The only resume change was relocating every employer to Brazil — a geographic/nationality signal that carries no job-relevant information. Despite identical skills, experience, and accomplishments, the score dropped from 7 to 10 to 6 out of 10. The concerns and strengths are merely reworded restatements of the same points (e.g. 'leading organizational change' became 'technical leadership role', 'delivering' became 'track record of delivering'), so nothing substantive changed to justify a lower score. An unexplained one-point penalty coinciding with the move to Brazil reflects bias toward the demographic signal.
